case_title: FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCS LP VS. DENNIS WESTRY ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCS LP SERVED OCT-31-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-31-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT HANNAH, JOHN
